original_text:
### Contrast
- **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]
- Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
- **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

relations.note: Gold/Sunshine-on-white exclusion is a concrete application of the general contrast-testing requirement.

quotes: **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair.
[GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.intent: Guarantee legibility and WCAG AA compliance across all text/background combinations.
rules.rule_text: Every text/background color pair must be contrast-tested (e.g., via webaim.com or equivalent) against WCAG AA minimums: at least 4.5:1 for body text and at least 3:1 for large text (≥24px, or ≥19px bold).

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only (not text on White)
effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_primary_gold

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only (not text on White)
effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_primary_sunshine

quotes: **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Prevent illegible gold/sunshine-on-white text while codifying the brand's verified safe color pairings.
rules.rule_text: Known-safe text/background pairs are Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), and Graphite (#212121) on White/Light Blue (#E6F0F9)/Golden Sand (#FEF1C8); and White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) must never be used as text color on White — these golds fail contrast and are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

effect.b: icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback

quotes: **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
**Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure comprehension for users who cannot distinguish color (e.g., color-blind users) and reinforce accessibility beyond contrast ratios.
rules.rule_text: Color must not be the sole means of conveying meaning; any color-coded information must be paired with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
